expectations.text: States that the workflow hard-stops after Phase 7 once Gate E passes
expectations.evidence: Gate E already passed, so do not continue into Phase 8 in the same session. Resume from a fresh session with coding-task-workflow RESUME=2026-04-23-add-rate-limit-logs. Phase 8 is the next phase after the resume. In that resumed session, start from `06-task-graph.yaml` and `05-plan.md`, execute slices in dependency order with strict red→green→refactor, update `07-implementation-log.md` after each slice, and never implement code before the failing test exists.
